summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of LeazeSure landing page. All sections, interactive elements, and responsive behavior working correctly.
passed_tests: Navigation bar loads with logo, nav links, and CTA button
Hero section displays correct headline and CTAs with dashboard mockup
Problem/Solution section with tenant and landlord cards
Rental Passport section with text and trust score mockup
Rent Reporting section with credit gauge and 3 benefit cards
Landlord Dashboard section with tenant management mockup
Pricing section with 3 tiers ($0, $9.99, $29) and correct pricing
Final CTA section with gradient background
Navigation scroll behavior for all anchor links
Brand colors and gradient styling implementation
